news.t: Raymond James Investment Management Launches Initial Suite of Active ETFs

overview.description: The RJ Eagle Municipal Income ETF (RJMI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg Municipal Bond index. The fund is an actively managed municipal bond ETF seeking current income exempt from federal tax. The fund invests primarily in municipal securities, including lower-quality and special situations bonds, aiming for higher tax-advantaged yield. RJMI was launched on Oct 2, 2025 and is issued by Raymond James.

data.title: Raymond James Investment Management Launches Initial Suite of Active ETFs
data.text: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla., Oct. 02, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Raymond James Investment Management , a global asset management company with $114.7 billion in assets and a wholly-owned subsidiary of Raymond J...
